description: Install dependencies and set up baseline build. Ensure the project compiles and lints cleanly before making changes.
steps: Run npm install in /projects/sandbox/Si-Admin to install all dependencies
Run npx prisma generate to generate the Prisma client
Run npx prisma db push to create the SQLite database from the schema
Run npm run build to verify the project builds successfully
Run npm run lint to verify no lint errors exist
verification: npm run build exits with code 0
npm run lint exits with code 0
findings: All steps passed. npm install added 697 packages. Build succeeded with Next.js 16.2.6 (Turbopack). Lint passed with 0 errors and 2 warnings (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps in ConversationList.tsx and MessageView.tsx - pre-existing, not introduced by this task). SQLite database created at prisma/dev.db.
